cards.title: THE PRODUCT
cards.description: Temporal intelligence for traders. Binary signals on world events — yes or no — published to Discord before the market resolves.

cards.title: THE MECHANIC
cards.description: Entity corpus + news monitoring + Vedic astrological timing. 1-bit signals. No ambiguity. No explanatory footnotes.

cards.title: THE RESULT
cards.description: 5/5 on blind test resolved markets. Brier Score: 0.0000. Not a demo. Not a backtest.

cards.title: THE PRODUCT
cards.description: Voice AI that makes real B2B calls. Handles objection. Books the meeting. Your phone starts ringing.

cards.title: THE MECHANIC
cards.description: Upload prospects → voice AI calls them → conversation → calendar booking. No humans involved in the outreach.

cards.title: THE STACK
cards.description: FastAPI + Sarvam STT + MiniMax TTS + Twilio webhook. Industry kits for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, pest control.

cards.title: THE PRODUCT
cards.description: When is this founder's next peak? When is this company likely to break out or burn out? For VCs who want to know before the pitch.

cards.title: THE MECHANIC
cards.description: Founder birth chart + company incorporation date → peak timing windows. Vedic astrology meets due diligence.

cards.title: THE USE CASE
cards.description: Pre-investment timing check. Portfolio founder review. Co-founder compatibility analysis.
